parts.label: Primary Structure (3U)

parts.label: Star Tracker Mount
parts.spec: Star tracker optical bench mount, CTE-matched, baffled sun shield, line-of-sight +-1deg

parts.label: Payload Optics Bench
parts.spec: EO payload optics bench, thermal stability, optical baffles, focal plane interface, lens mounts

parts.label: Cold Gas Thruster x 4
parts.spec: Cold gas propulsion thruster bracket, 4 thrusters cross-pattern, 50mN class, plumbing manifold

parts.label: Separation Spring Plate
parts.spec: P-POD or ISIPOD separation interface plate, spring pusher contact, kill switch arm

parts.label: CDH Avionics Stack

parts.label: Thermal Path / Radiator Strap Evidence
parts.spec: Thermal_path closure module: radiator_face, thermal_strap_note, vent_hole, battery-to-frame conduction pad, service-visible thermal datum, inspection label, mass budget <120g

parts.label: Integration Harness + Datum Spine

Thermal management through aluminum heat conduction
Interfaces with solar panel, payload, and antenna modules

verify.rule: Ensure all specified fields in the schema are included.
Ensure the estimated mass matches the design constraints.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets are represented in part_tree/geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Each P0 feature must be traceable to a specific geometry operation.

verify.value: Interfaces with Solar_Panel_Module, Payload_Module, Antenna_Module are defined with reciprocal details.
verify.rule: Adjacent interfaces must specify connection_type, DOF, clearance, and required_feature.

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to mixed materials (Al 7075 and CFRP).
risk.mit: Conduct thermal analysis and adjust design if necessary.

risk.desc: Risk of insufficient stiffness in deployable rail guides under dynamic loads.
risk.mit: Perform stress analysis on rail guides and reinforce if needed.

risk.desc: Possible misalignment of PC/104 connectors due to manufacturing tolerances.
risk.mit: Implement tighter manufacturing tolerances and conduct alignment checks post-manufacture.

risk.desc: Risk of inadequate service access for maintenance and inspection.
risk.mit: Increase size of service access panels and ensure clear labeling.

risk.desc: Potential for interference between harness interfaces and moving parts.
risk.mit: Review harness routing and consider using flexible cables or rerouting harnesses.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: 3U CubeSat primary frame, deployable rail guide grooves, PC/104 standoffs
physics_paths: Load: Structural loads from solar panels and payloads transferred through frame.
Flow: Electrical signals from onboard systems pass through PC/104 connectors.
Thermal: Heat dissipation from electronics managed via aluminum heat conduction.
Motion: Rail guides enable deployment of external components.
Pressure: Internal pressure maintained within sealed compartments.
Electrical/Data: Power and data routing through onboard bus system.
